# theme

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Toolbar toggle for light/dark mode.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ActionBar.Item` → `ThemeToggle`
  - Uses: `apps.useCurrentAppId`, `config_v2.useConfig`, `config_v2.useScopeMembership`, `config_v2.useSetConfig`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `shell/action-bar.ActionBar`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
